smart_set.definition: wallet_scores: drop_top3>0 AND monthly_run_rate>=3.75 SOL AND total>=0.5 SOL (n/recency relaxed vs follow-list gate)

notes: M2/M3/M4 use the look-ahead-clean 0-30s actionable membership (knowable at T+30); M1/M5 use any-phase wallet history.
competition_signals captures only ~20-40 tx/grad, so actionable membership undercounts (false negatives).
wallet_tx_cache covers only scored wallets’ last ~400 sigs, recent-token biased — cache-present is a lower bound.
